<content>
1: import 'dart:async';
2: 
3: import 'package:cached_network_image/cached_network_image.dart';
4: import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
5: import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';
6: import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';
7: import 'package:media_kit/media_kit.dart';
8: import 'package:media_kit_video/media_kit_video.dart';
9: 
10: import '../../content/movies/data/movie_models.dart';
11: import '../../content/movies/data/movies_api.dart';
12: import '../../../core/player/youtube_resolver.dart';
13: import '../../../core/player/watch_progress_api.dart';
14: import '../../content/shared/presentation/status_picker.dart';
15: import '../../../core/build_flavor.dart';
16: import '../../../core/theme/app_colors.dart';
17: 
18: final RegExp _youtubeIdPattern =
19:     RegExp(r'(?:v=|youtu\.be/)([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})');
20: 
21: String? _extractYoutubeId(String url) {
22:   final match = _youtubeIdPattern.firstMatch(url);
23:   return match?.group(1);
24: }
25: 
26: class HeroBanner extends ConsumerStatefulWidget {
27:   final MovieSummary movie;
28:   final List<MovieSummary>? featuredMovies;
29: 
30:   const HeroBanner({super.key, required this.movie, this.featuredMovies});
31: 
32:   @override
33:   ConsumerState<HeroBanner> createState() => _HeroBannerState();
34: }
35: 
36: class _HeroBannerState extends ConsumerState<HeroBanner> {
37:   Timer? _idleTimer;
38:   Timer? _rotationTimer;
39:   Player? _player;
40:   VideoController? _controller;
41:   bool _showVideo = false;
42:   bool _isFocused = false;
43:   int _currentIndex = 0;
44: 
45:   MovieSummary get _effectiveMovie =>
46:       isTvBuild
47:           ? widget.movie
48:           : (widget.featuredMovies ?? [widget.movie])[_currentIndex];
49: 
50:   @override
51:   void initState() {
52:     super.initState();
53:     if (!isTvBuild &&
54:         widget.featuredMovies != null &&
55:         widget.featuredMovies!.length > 1) {
56:       _rotationTimer = Timer.periodic(const Duration(seconds: 6), (_) {
57:         if (mounted) {
58:           setState(() {
59:             _currentIndex =
60:                 (_currentIndex + 1) % widget.featuredMovies!.length;
61:           });
62:         }
63:       });
64:     }
65:   }
66: 
67:   void _onFocusChange(bool focused) {
68:     setState(() => _isFocused = focused);
69:     _idleTimer?.cancel();
70:     if (focused) {
71:       _idleTimer = Timer(const Duration(milliseconds: 1500), _startTrailer);
72:     } else {
73:       _stopTrailer();
74:     }
75:   }
76: 
77:   Future<void> _startTrailer() async {
78:     try {
79:       final movie = await ref
80:           .read(moviesApiProvider)
81:           .detail(widget.movie.slug ?? widget.movie.id);
82:       final trailerUrl = movie.trailerUrl;
83:       if (trailerUrl == null) return;
84:       final youtubeId = _extractYoutubeId(trailerUrl);
85:       if (youtubeId == null) return;
86:       final streamUrl = await resolveYoutubeStreamUrl(youtubeId);
87:       if (!mounted || !_isFocused) return;
88: 
89:       final player = Player();
90:       await player.open(Media(streamUrl), play: true);
91:       await player.setVolume(0);
92:       player.stream.completed.listen((completed) {
93:         if (completed) player.seek(Duration.zero);
94:       });
95: 
96:       if (!mounted || !_isFocused) {
97:         player.dispose();
98:         return;
99:       }
100:       _player?.dispose();
101:       setState(() {
102:         _player = player;
103:         _controller = VideoController(player);
104:         _showVideo = true;
105:       });
106:     } catch (_) {}
107:   }
108: 
109:   void _stopTrailer() {
110:     setState(() => _showVideo = false);
111:     final player = _player;
112:     _player = null;
113:     _controller = null;
114:     player?.dispose();
115:   }
116: 
117:   @override
118:   void dispose() {
119:     _idleTimer?.cancel();
120:     _rotationTimer?.cancel();
121:     _player?.dispose();
122:     super.dispose();
123:   }
124: 
125:   @override
126:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
127:     final theme = Theme.of(context);
128:     final movie = _effectiveMovie;
129: 
130:     if (isTvBuild) {
131:       return Focus(
132:         onFocusChange: _onFocusChange,
133:         child: GestureDetector(
134:           onTap: () =>
135:               context.push('/movies/${movie.slug ?? movie.id}'),
136:           child: SizedBox(
137:             height: 400,
138:             width: double.infinity,
139:             child: Stack(
140:               fit: StackFit.expand,
141:               children: [
142:                 CachedNetworkImage(
143:                   imageUrl: movie.backdropUrl ?? movie.posterUrl ?? '',
144:                   fit: BoxFit.cover,
145:                   errorWidget: (_, _, _) =>
146:                       Container(color: theme.colorScheme.surface),
147:                   placeholder: (_, _) =>
148:                       Container(color: theme.colorScheme.surface),
149:                 ),
150:                 AnimatedOpacity(
151:                   opacity: _showVideo ? 1.0 : 0.0,
152:                   duration: Duration(milliseconds: _showVideo ? 800 : 300),
153:                   curve: _showVideo ? Curves.easeInOutCubic : Curves.easeOut,
154:                   child: _controller != null
155:                       ? Video(
156:                           controller: _controller!,
157:                           controls: NoVideoControls,
158:                         )
159:                       : const SizedBox.shrink(),
160:                 ),
161:                 Positioned(
162:                   left: 0,
163:                   right: 0,
164:                   bottom: 0,
165:                   child: Container(
166:                     padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24),
167:                     decoration: BoxDecoration(
168:                       gradient: LinearGradient(
169:                         begin: Alignment.topCenter,
170:                         end: Alignment.bottomCenter,
171:                         colors: [
172:                           Colors.transparent,
173:                           Colors.black.withAlpha(200),
174:                         ],
175:                       ),
176:                     ),
177:                     child: Column(
178:                       crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
179:                       mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
180:                       children: [
181:                         Text(
182:                           movie.title,
183:                           style: theme.textTheme.headlineSmall
184:                               ?.copyWith(color: Colors.white),
185:                         ),
186:                         const SizedBox(height: 12),
187:                         ElevatedButton.icon(
188:                           onPressed: () => context.push(
189:                               '/movies/${movie.slug ?? movie.id}'),
190:                           icon: const Icon(Icons.play_arrow),
191:                           label: const Text('View'),
192:                         ),
193:                       ],
194:                     ),
195:                   ),
196:                 ),
197:                 if (_showVideo)
198:                   Positioned(
199:                     top: 16,
200:                     right: 16,
201:                     child: AnimatedOpacity(
202:                       opacity: _showVideo ? 1.0 : 0.0,
203:                       duration: const Duration(milliseconds: 400),
204:                       child: const Icon(Icons.volume_off, color: Colors.white70),
205:                     ),
206:                   ),
207:               ],
208:             ),
209:           ),
210:         ),
211:       );
212:     }
213: 
214:     final movies = widget.featuredMovies ?? [widget.movie];
215: 
216:     return SizedBox(
217:       height: MediaQuery.of(context).size.height * 0.55,
218:       width: double.infinity,
219:       child: Stack(
220:         fit: StackFit.expand,
221:         children: [
222:           AnimatedSwitcher(
223:             duration: const Duration(milliseconds: 800),
224:             child: CachedNetworkImage(
225:               key: ValueKey(_currentIndex),
226:               imageUrl: movie.backdropUrl ?? movie.posterUrl ?? '',
227:               fit: BoxFit.cover,
228:               errorWidget: (_, _, _) =>
229:                   Container(color: theme.colorScheme.surface),
230:               placeholder: (_, _) =>
231:                   Container(color: theme.colorScheme.surface),
232:             ),
233:           ),
234:           Positioned(
235:             left: 0,
236:             right: 0,
237:             bottom: 0,
238:             child: Container(
239:               padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24),
240:               decoration: BoxDecoration(
241:                 gradient: LinearGradient(
242:                   begin: Alignment.topCenter,
243:                   end: Alignment.bottomCenter,
244:                   colors: [
245:                     Colors.transparent,
246:                     theme.scaffoldBackgroundColor,
247:                   ],
248:                   stops: const [0.45, 1.0],
249:                 ),
250:               ),
251:               child: Column(
252:                 crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
253:                 mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
254:                 children: [
255:                   Text(
256:                     movie.title,
257:                     maxLines: 2,
258:                     overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
259:                     style: theme.textTheme.displaySmall?.copyWith(
260:                       fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
261:                       color: Colors.white,
262:                     ),
263:                   ),
264:                   const SizedBox(height: 12),
265:                   Row(
266:                     children: [
267:                       FilledButton.icon(
268:                         onPressed: () =>
269:                             context.push('/movies/${movie.slug ?? movie.id}'),
270:                         icon: const Icon(Icons.play_arrow),
271:                         label: const Text('Play'),
272:                       ),
273:                       const SizedBox(width: 12),
274:                       OutlinedButton.icon(
275:                         onPressed: () async {
276:                           final api = ref.read(watchProgressApiProvider);
277:                           final existing =
278:                               await api.getMovieProgress(movie.id);
279:                           if (!context.mounted) return;
280:                           final selected = await showStatusPicker(
281:                               context, current: existing?.status);
282:                           if (selected == null) return;
283:                           await api.saveMovieProgress(
284:                             movie.id,
285:                             existing?.progress ?? 0,
286:                             existing?.duration ?? 0,
287:                             status: selected,
288:                           );
289:                           if (context.mounted) {
290:                             ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
291:                               SnackBar(
292:                                 content: Text(
293:                                     'Added to ${watchStatusLabel(selected)}'),
294:                               ),
295:                             );
296:                           }
297:                         },
298:                         icon: const Icon(Icons.add),
299:                         label: const Text('My List'),
300:                       ),
301:                     ],
302:                   ),
303:                 ],
304:               ),
305:             ),
306:           ),
307:           if (movies.length > 1)
308:             Positioned(
309:               bottom: 16,
310:               right: 16,
311:               child: Row(
312:                 mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
313:                 children: List.generate(movies.length, (i) {
314:                   return Container(
315:                     margin: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 3),
316:                     width: 8,
317:                     height: 8,
318:                     decoration: BoxDecoration(
319:                       shape: BoxShape.circle,
320:                       color: i == _currentIndex
321:                           ? (theme.brightness == Brightness.dark
322:                               ? AppColors.dark.accent
323:                               : AppColors.light.accent)
324:                           : Colors.white.withAlpha(100),
325:                     ),
326:                   );
327:                 }),
328:               ),
329:             ),
330:         ],
331:       ),
332:     );
333:   }
334: }

1: import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
2: import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';
3: import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';
4: import 'package:shimmer/shimmer.dart';
5: 
6: import '../../../core/build_flavor.dart';
7: import '../../ads/presentation/ad_slot_card.dart';
8: import '../../content/anime/data/anime_api.dart';
9: import '../../content/anime/data/anime_models.dart';
10: import '../../content/movies/data/movies_api.dart';
11: import '../../content/movies/data/movie_models.dart';
12: import '../../content/shared/presentation/content_carousel.dart';
13: import '../../content/shared/presentation/poster_card.dart';
14: import '../../content/tv_shows/data/tv_shows_api.dart';
15: import '../../content/tv_shows/data/tv_show_models.dart';
16: import '../../../core/network/api_client.dart';
17: import '../data/continue_watching_api.dart';
18: import '../../content/shared/presentation/status_picker.dart';
19: import 'hero_banner.dart';
20: 
21: final homeFeaturedMoviesProvider =
22:     FutureProvider<Map<String, List<MovieSummary>>>((ref) {
23:       return ref.watch(moviesApiProvider).featured();
24:     });
25: 
26: final homePopularTvProvider =
27:     FutureProvider<({List<TvShowSummary> data, Map<String, dynamic> meta})>((
28:       ref,
29:     ) {
30:       return ref.watch(tvShowsApiProvider).search(sortBy: 'popular', limit: 10);
31:     });
32: 
33: final homeTrendingAnimeProvider =
34:     FutureProvider<({List<AnimeSummary> media, Map<String, dynamic> pageInfo})>(
35:       (ref) {
36:         return ref
37:             .watch(animeApiProvider)
38:             .search(sort: 'TRENDING_DESC', perPage: 10);
39:       },
40:     );
41: 
42: final continueWatchingProvider = FutureProvider<List<ContinueWatchingItem>>((
43:   ref,
44: ) async {
45:   final dio = ref.watch(dioProvider);
46:   final results = await Future.wait([
47:     fetchMovieHistory(dio),
48:     fetchTvHistory(dio),
49:     fetchAnimeHistory(dio),
50:   ]);
51:   final combined = [...results[0], ...results[1], ...results[2]];
52:   combined.sort((a, b) => b.updatedAt.compareTo(a.updatedAt));
53:   return combined.take(15).toList();
54: });
55: 
56: class ContinueWatchingFilterNotifier extends Notifier<String?> {
57:   @override
58:   String? build() => null;
59: 
60:   void setFilter(String? value) => state = value;
61: }
62: 
63: final continueWatchingFilterProvider =
64:     NotifierProvider<ContinueWatchingFilterNotifier, String?>(
65:       ContinueWatchingFilterNotifier.new,
66:     );
67: 
68: class HomeScreen extends ConsumerWidget {
69:   const HomeScreen({super.key});
70: 
71:   @override
72:   Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {
73:     final continueAsync = ref.watch(continueWatchingProvider);
74:     final featuredAsync = ref.watch(homeFeaturedMoviesProvider);
75:     final tvAsync = ref.watch(homePopularTvProvider);
76:     final animeAsync = ref.watch(homeTrendingAnimeProvider);
77:     final selectedFilter = ref.watch(continueWatchingFilterProvider);
78: 
79:     return Scaffold(
80:       extendBodyBehindAppBar: !isTvBuild,
81:       appBar: isTvBuild
82:           ? AppBar(title: const Text('NaijaSpride'))
83:           : AppBar(
84:               title: const Text('NaijaSpride'),
85:               backgroundColor: Colors.transparent,
86:               elevation: 0,
87:               leading: IconButton(
88:                 icon: const Icon(Icons.person_outline),
89:                 onPressed: () => context.push('/profile'),
90:               ),
91:               actions: [
92:                 IconButton(
93:                   icon: const Icon(Icons.download_outlined),
94:                   onPressed: () => context.push('/downloads'),
95:                 ),
96:               ],
97:             ),
98:       body: SingleChildScrollView(
99:         child: Column(
100:           crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
101:           children: [
102:             featuredAsync.when(
103:               data: (featured) {
104:                 final heroMovie =
105:                     (featured['trending'] ?? featured['mostWatched'] ?? [])
106:                         .cast<MovieSummary>()
107:                         .firstOrNull;
108:                 if (heroMovie == null) return const SizedBox.shrink();
109:                 if (isTvBuild) {
110:                   return HeroBanner(movie: heroMovie);
111:                 }
112:                 final heroMovies = [
113:                   if (featured['trending'] != null) ...featured['trending']!,
114:                   if (featured['mostWatched'] != null)
115:                     ...featured['mostWatched']!,
116:                   if (featured['latestUploads'] != null)
117:                     ...featured['latestUploads']!,
118:                   if (featured['newReleases'] != null)
119:                     ...featured['newReleases']!,
120:                   if (featured['comingSoon'] != null)
121:                     ...featured['comingSoon']!,
122:                 ].take(5).toList();
123:                 return HeroBanner(movie: heroMovie, featuredMovies: heroMovies);
124:               },
125:               loading: () => const SizedBox.shrink(),
126:               error: (_, _) => _inlineError(
127:                 () => ref.invalidate(homeFeaturedMoviesProvider),
128:               ),
129:             ),
130:             continueAsync.when(
131:               data: (items) {
132:                 if (items.isEmpty) return const SizedBox.shrink();
133:                 final filteredItems = selectedFilter == null
134:                     ? items
135:                     : items.where((i) => i.status == selectedFilter).toList();
136:                 return Column(
137:                   crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
138:                   children: [
139:                     Padding(
140:                       padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(
141:                         horizontal: 16,
142:                         vertical: 4,
143:                       ),
144:                       child: SizedBox(
145:                         height: 36,
146:                         child: ListView(
147:                           scrollDirection: Axis.horizontal,
148:                           children: [
149:                             Padding(
150:                               padding: const EdgeInsets.only(right: 8),
151:                               child: ChoiceChip(
152:                                 label: const Text('All'),
153:                                 selected: selectedFilter == null,
154:                                 onSelected: (_) => ref
155:                                     .read(
156:                                       continueWatchingFilterProvider.notifier,
157:                                     )
158:                                     .setFilter(null),
159:                               ),
160:                             ),
161:                             ...kWatchStatuses.map((s) {
162:                               return Padding(
163:                                 padding: const EdgeInsets.only(right: 8),
164:                                 child: ChoiceChip(
165:                                   label: Text(watchStatusLabel(s)),
166:                                   selected: selectedFilter == s,
167:                                   onSelected: (_) => ref
168:                                       .read(
169:                                         continueWatchingFilterProvider.notifier,
170:                                       )
171:                                       .setFilter(s),
172:                                 ),
173:                               );
174:                             }),
175:                           ],
176:                         ),
177:                       ),
178:                     ),
179:                     if (filteredItems.isEmpty)
180:                       const Padding(
181:                         padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(
182:                           horizontal: 16,
183:                           vertical: 8,
184:                         ),
185:                         child: Text('No items with this status'),
186:                       )
187:                     else
188:                       ContentCarousel(
189:                         title: 'Continue Watching',
190:                         children: filteredItems.map((item) {
191:                           return PosterCard(
192:                             imageUrl: item.imageUrl ?? '',
193:                             title: item.title,
194:                             progressFraction: item.progressFraction,
195:                             onTap: () {
196:                               switch (item.contentType) {
197:                                 case 'movie':
198:                                   context.push('/movies/${item.slug}');
199:                                 case 'tv':
200:                                   context.push('/tv/${item.slug}');
201:                                 case 'anime':
202:                                   context.push('/anime/${item.anilistId}');
203:                               }
204:                             },
205:                           );
206:                         }).toList(),
207:                       ),
208:                   ],
209:                 );
210:               },
211:               loading: () => const SizedBox.shrink(),
212:               error: (_, _) =>
213:                   _inlineError(() => ref.invalidate(continueWatchingProvider)),
214:             ),
215:             featuredAsync.when(
216:               data: (featured) {
217:                 const sections = [
218:                   ('Most Watched', 'mostWatched'),
219:                   ('Trending', 'trending'),
220:                   ('Latest Uploads', 'latestUploads'),
221:                   ('New Releases', 'newReleases'),
222:                   ('Coming Soon', 'comingSoon'),
223:                 ];
224:                 final carousels = <Widget>[];
225:                 for (final s in sections) {
226:                   final list = featured[s.$2];
227:                   if (list == null || list.isEmpty) continue;
228: 
229:                   final stdMovies = list.where((m) => m.youtubeId == null).toList();
230:                   final ytMovies = list.where((m) => m.youtubeId != null).toList();
231: 
232:                   if (stdMovies.isNotEmpty) {
233:                     carousels.add(ContentCarousel(
234:                       title: s.$1,
235:                       children: stdMovies.map((movie) => PosterCard(
236:                         imageUrl: movie.posterUrl ?? movie.thumbnailUrl ?? movie.coverUrl ?? '',
237:                         isRectangular: false,
238:                         title: movie.title,
239:                         onTap: () => context.push('/movies/${movie.slug ?? movie.id}'),
240:                       )).toList(),
241:                     ));
242:                   }
243: 
244:                   if (ytMovies.isNotEmpty) {
245:                     carousels.add(ContentCarousel(
246:                       title: '${s.$1} (Nollywood/Free)',
247:                       height: 160,
248:                       children: ytMovies.map((movie) => PosterCard(
249:                         imageUrl: movie.backdropUrl ?? movie.thumbnailUrl ?? movie.posterUrl ?? movie.coverUrl ?? '',
250:                         isRectangular: true,
251:                         title: movie.title,
252:                         onTap: () => context.push('/movies/${movie.slug ?? movie.id}'),
253:                       )).toList(),
254:                     ));
255:                   }
256:                 }
257:                 return Column(
258:                   children: [
259:                     ...carousels.take(2),
260:                     if (!isTvBuild) const AdBannerCard(placement: 'HOME_FEED'),
261:                     ...carousels.skip(2),
262:                   ],
263:                 );
264:               },
265:               loading: () => _loadingRow,
266:               error: (_, _) => _inlineError(
267:                 () => ref.invalidate(homeFeaturedMoviesProvider),
268:               ),
269:             ),
270:             tvAsync.when(
271:               data: (tv) => tv.data.isNotEmpty
272:                   ? ContentCarousel(
273:                       title: 'Popular TV Shows',
274:                       children: tv.data
275:                           .map(
276:                             (show) => PosterCard(
277:                               imageUrl:
278:                                   show.posterUrl ?? show.thumbnailUrl ?? '',
279:                               title: show.title,
280:                               onTap: () => context.push('/tv/${show.slug}'),
281:                             ),
282:                           )
283:                           .toList(),
284:                     )
285:                   : const SizedBox.shrink(),
286:               loading: () => _loadingRow,
287:               error: (_, _) =>
288:                   _inlineError(() => ref.invalidate(homePopularTvProvider)),
289:             ),
290:             animeAsync.when(
291:               data: (anime) => anime.media.isNotEmpty
292:                   ? ContentCarousel(
293:                       title: 'Trending Anime',
294:                       children: anime.media
295:                           .map(
296:                             (entry) => PosterCard(
297:                               imageUrl:
298:                                   entry.coverImage.large ??
299:                                   entry.coverImage.medium ??
300:                                   '',
301:                               title:
302:                                   entry.title.english ??
303:                                   entry.title.romaji ??
304:                                   entry.title.native ??
305:                                   'Untitled',
306:                               onTap: () => context.push('/anime/${entry.id}'),
307:                             ),
308:                           )
309:                           .toList(),
310:                     )
311:                   : const SizedBox.shrink(),
312:               loading: () => _loadingRow,
313:               error: (_, _) =>
314:                   _inlineError(() => ref.invalidate(homeTrendingAnimeProvider)),
315:             ),
316:           ],
317:         ),
318:       ),
319:     );
320:   }
321: 
322:   Widget _inlineError(VoidCallback onRetry) {
323:     return Padding(
324:       padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 8),
325:       child: Row(
326:         children: [
327:           const Icon(Icons.error_outline, size: 18),
328:           const SizedBox(width: 8),
329:           const Text("Couldn't load"),
330:           TextButton(onPressed: onRetry, child: const Text('Retry')),
331:         ],
332:       ),
333:     );
334:   }
335: 
336:   Widget get _loadingRow {
337:     return SizedBox(
338:       height: 240,

377:                 borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(4),
378:               ),
379:             ),
380:           ],
381:         ),
382:       ),
383:     );
384:   }
385: }

state.title: 0 todos

part.text:
All changes applied and formatted. Here's a summary:

**`hero_banner.dart`:**
- **Gradient**: Multi-stop `LinearGradient` (`topCenter`→`bottomCenter`) with stops `[0.0, 0.4, 0.7, 1.0]` — fades from transparent → transparent → semi-opaque → solid scaffold background (applied to both TV and mobile builds).
- **Title**: `displayMedium` with `w900`, `letterSpacing: -1.0`, and a `Shadow(blurRadius: 10)` drop shadow.
- **Buttons**: `StadiumBorder()` pills. Play/View button: white fill, black text/icon. My List button: `white.withAlpha(40)` frosted glass, white text/icon, subtle white border.

**`home_screen.dart`:**
- **`_LoadingCard`**: `Shimmer.fromColors` with `grey.shade900`/`grey.shade800`, `borderRadius: 12`.
- **Filter chips**: Sleek pill toggles — primary fill + white text when selected; `white.withAlpha(15)` bg + `white70` text when unselected; no border.
- **Padding**: All section headers, horizontal lists, and error messages bumped from `horizontal: 16` to `horizontal: 24`.
